mxCell.value: Inform customer DPA has failed and end call
Select reason for call from level 1
From level 1 selection, level 2 selection is selected
Wait for customer to repeat Otac
Enter Otac from customer and click next
Steps to Triage calls (Find the correct process to use)
OTAC is the OTP used as a security pin
From level 2 selection, level 3 selection is selected
View details of my bills and payments
Click Bill format & select itemized from Summary
Specific available new billing cycle deatils to customer
Select the payment from drop down
Check if the balance is in credit
Select applicable option from drop down e.g transfer existing funds
Check Balance & advise customer of timeframe
Select applicable option from drop down e.g take a payment
